title: Tiger Prawn and Crisp Skillet
description: A flavorful dish from Slovakia, combining succulent prawns with crispy elements for a satisfying meal.
instructions: Heat the garlicky slovakian oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the tiger prawns and cook for 2-3 minutes per side, until they are pink and cooked through.
Remove the prawns from the skillet and set aside.
Add the crisp to the skillet and cook for 2-3 minutes, until crispy and golden brown.
Return the prawns to the skillet and squeeze the lemon juice over them.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Garnish with chopped fresh parsley and serve immediately.
